headline: Walmart Taps The Farmer's Dog To Grow Premium Pet Food Story
summary: Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT) is partnering with The Farmer's Dog to offer human-grade dog meals across its nationwide retail network. The products are set to be available for the first time in Walmart stores and online, moving The Farmer's Dog beyond its direct-to-consumer channel. This collaboration opens Walmart to the premium fresh pet food segment, targeting pet owners seeking higher quality nutrition options. The move puts Walmart directly into the premium pet food conversation, an area that...
